sections.heading: This Order may be cited as the Property Transfer Tax Title
There shall be exempt from tax under the Act a transfer
sections.text:
Exemption
of property by a shareholder of a company incorporated under
the Companies Act, if such transfer is his contribution towards Cap. 686
the equity of that company.
L. J. MWANANSHIKU,
Minister of Finance
LUSAKA
26th February, 1985
[SF.44/9]
Copies of this Statul.ory Instrument can be obtained from Ille Government. Printer,
